description: Initial screen state: Onboarding screen for Askable Sessions with instructions to share the window.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: A dark screen with the text 'Great. To start, please click the "Share" button in the Meet call controls and choose to share this window.' is displayed.

description: Introductory transcription text appears on the screen, welcoming the user and explaining the task of planning a holiday to London.
frame_description: Text is being typed out on the dark background: 'Thank you. I can see your screen now. Imagine you're living on the Sunshine Coast in Queensland and you're planning a holiday to London...'

description: An 'Open' button appears at the bottom of the interface.
frame_description: A circular button with the text 'Open' and an external link icon appears at the bottom center of the screen.

description: Browser indicates a pop-up was blocked in the address bar and via a notification.
frame_description: A 'Pop-up blocked' icon appears in the right side of the URL bar, and a small notification appears briefly.

description: A second block of transcription text appears, instructing the user to think aloud during the task.
frame_description: New text appears: 'Please remember to think aloud as you work through this task, describing what you are seeing and doing...'

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned directly over the 'Open' button at the bottom of the screen.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The 'Open' button is activated by a click.

description: A new tab opens and navigates to Google.
page_title: Google
frame_description: The browser switches to a new tab and the Google search homepage loads.

description: User hovers over the Google search bar.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the central search input field on the Google homepage.

description: User clicks on the search bar.
frame_description: The search bar is focused, indicated by the cursor changing to a text input beam and the field being highlighted.

description: User types 'sunshine coast to london flights' into the search bar.
frame_description: The text 'sunshine coast to london flights' appears in the search bar as the user types.

description: Autocomplete search suggestions appear below the search bar.
frame_description: A dropdown menu with various search suggestions related to 'sunshine coast to london flights' appears.

description: User initiates the search (via Enter key).
frame_description: The search is submitted, and the page begins to transition.

description: The page navigates to the Google search results.
page_title: sunshine coast to london flights - Google Search
frame_description: The Google search results page for 'sunshine coast to london flights' is displayed.

description: User scrolls down the search results page.
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls past the initial results.

description: User hovers over the Skyscanner search result link.
interaction_target: Flights from Sunshine Coast to London - Skyscanner
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the blue link for the Skyscanner website in the search results.

description: User clicks on the Skyscanner search result.
interaction_target: Flights from Sunshine Coast to London - Skyscanner
frame_description: The Skyscanner link is clicked, and the browser begins loading the new page.

description: User hovers over the 'Depart' date input field.

description: A date picker modal opens.

description: User selects a departure date.

description: User hovers over the 'Search' button.

description: Click on the Google search bar to focus the input field.

description: The page begins navigating to the flight search results.

description: A dropdown list of destination suggestions appears.

description: Select 'London (LHR - Heathrow)' from the destination suggestions.

frame_description: The cursor clicks on the Heathrow airport option in the dropdown list.

description: The destination field updates with the selected location and the dropdown closes.

description: User pauses for a long duration before the next interaction, suggesting hesitation or review of the form.
